# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Resources:
  MyQueue:
    Type: "AWS::SQS::Queue"
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
  MyTopic:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
  QueuePolicy:
    Type: "AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy"
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - Ref: "MyQueue"
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
            Resource: !GetAtt MyQueue.Arn
        - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref MyTopic
        - Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Action: 'sqs:SendMessage'
            Resource: !GetAtt MyQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Ref MyTopic
